about.headline: A modern wardrobe between cultures.
about.bodyOne: {brand} was created for people who live in the overlap: African heritage, European restraint, streetwear confidence, and a practical everyday rhythm. The brand is premium by construction, not by exclusion.
about.bodyTwo: The launch collection focuses on pieces with a real reason to exist: satin-lined hoods and beanies, structured layers, precise trims, and understated details that carry heritage without noise.
about.minimalismBody: A restrained visual language: matte black, soft ivory, decisive proportions, and enough whitespace to let materials speak.
about.heritageBody: References appear through border rhythm, embroidery placement, satin interiors, and subtle pattern language.
about.premiumBody: The goal is a luxury feeling at a price point designed for real wardrobes, repeat wear, and long-term loyalty.

contact.headline: Customer care, press, and partnerships.
contact.body: Send us a note for sizing, order questions, editorial requests, or wholesale conversations.

faq.headline: Frequently asked questions
faq.body: Clear answers for a launch-ready premium ecommerce experience.
faq.a1: AMAMBRA is based in Stuttgart, Germany. The brand direction combines European minimalism with subtle African heritage inspiration.
faq.a2: The launch setup supports Germany and EU shipping. Standard Germany delivery is planned at 2-4 business days, with free Germany shipping over EUR 100.
faq.a3: The recommended production policy is a 14-day EU withdrawal period plus a customer-friendly 30-day return window for unworn items with tags attached.
faq.a4: Most launch pieces use relaxed or oversized streetwear proportions. Product pages include variant, fit, and material notes for each item.
faq.q5: What makes the satin-lined pieces different?
faq.a5: The satin interior reduces friction and adds a tactile luxury detail, especially useful for hoods and beanies worn frequently.
faq.a6: The storefront includes a Shopify Cart API handoff. Add Shopify Storefront credentials and product variant IDs to redirect directly into Shopify Checkout.
faq.q7: How do I contact customer care?
faq.a7: Email {email}. Production deployments should connect the contact action to an email provider or CRM.

legal.impressumIntro: German legal disclosure placeholder for production completion.
legal.providerBody: {brand}, {address}. Replace this placeholder with the registered legal entity, managing director, registration court, VAT ID, and responsible contact before launch.
legal.editorialResponsibilityBody: Name and address of the person responsible under German press law must be added before public launch.
legal.privacyIntro: GDPR-oriented privacy structure for an AMAMBRA production launch.
legal.dataControllerBody: AMAMBRA must add the final legal entity, address, and data protection contact before launch.
legal.storefrontDataBody: The storefront processes contact form data, newsletter consent, cart state, checkout profile data, analytics consent state, and order data once Shopify is connected.
legal.legalBasisBody: Processing should be mapped to contract performance, consent, legitimate interest, and legal obligations under GDPR Articles 6 and 7.
legal.customerRightsBody: Customers can request access, correction, deletion, restriction, portability, and objection. Production should connect these requests to a support workflow.
legal.termsIntro: Production terms should be reviewed by German ecommerce counsel before launch.
legal.scopeBody: These terms apply to purchases made through the AMAMBRA online store once checkout is live.
legal.pricesPaymentBody: All prices are displayed in EUR and should include German VAT where applicable. Shopify Checkout handles payment authorization and fraud controls.
legal.withdrawalReturnsBody: EU consumers have statutory withdrawal rights. The launch recommendation is to provide a clear 14-day withdrawal notice plus a customer-friendly 30-day return window.
legal.imprintIntro: Legal provider information for AMAMBRA. Final company registration details must be verified before public launch.
legal.commercialRegistrationBody: Add the registered legal entity, managing director, registration court, commercial register number, and VAT identification number before launch. This page should remain reachable from every storefront page.
legal.consumerDisputeBody: State whether the company participates in consumer arbitration and include required EU or German consumer dispute references after legal review.
legal.privacyPolicyIntro: A GDPR-ready privacy structure for AMAMBRA customers, newsletter subscribers, and storefront visitors.
legal.retentionSecurityBody: Personal data should only be retained for the period required for order fulfillment, tax obligations, fraud prevention, customer support, and active consent records. Production systems should use least-privilege access and audited processors.
legal.processorsTransfersBody: List production processors such as Shopify, payment providers, shipping partners, analytics tools, email service providers, and hosting vendors. International transfers should rely on appropriate safeguards where required.
legal.refundPolicyIntro: Refunds should be clear, fast, and aligned with EU consumer rights while protecting product quality and hygiene standards.
legal.returnEligibilityBody: Items should be returned unworn, unwashed, undamaged, and with original tags and packaging. Final sale or hygiene-sensitive exceptions must be clearly disclosed before checkout.
legal.refundTimingBody: After inspection, approved refunds should be issued to the original payment method. Payment providers may require additional processing time before funds appear on the customer statement.
legal.exchangesStoreCreditBody: Size exchanges and store credit can be offered as customer-friendly options, but they should not reduce statutory withdrawal rights for eligible EU consumers.
legal.damagedIncorrectBody: Customers should contact support promptly with the order number and clear photos. AMAMBRA should prioritize replacement, repair, refund, or return-label support depending on the issue.
legal.accessibilityIntro: AMAMBRA aims to make the storefront usable, calm, and understandable across devices, assistive technologies, and motion preferences.
legal.accessibilityStandardsBody: The frontend should be evaluated against WCAG 2.2 AA expectations, including keyboard access, semantic headings, form labels, visible focus states, contrast safety, and responsive zoom behavior.
legal.keyboardMotionBody: Core shopping, navigation, cookie preferences, search, cart, and checkout flows should remain operable by keyboard. Motion should respect reduced-motion preferences without removing content.
legal.accessibilitySupportBody: Customers who encounter barriers should be able to contact support with the page URL, device, browser, and assistive technology details so issues can be triaged before and after launch.
legal.knownLimitationsBody: Third-party checkout, payment, analytics, and embedded tools must be reviewed separately when connected because their accessibility behavior may change outside this frontend codebase.

shipping.headline: Shipping and returns
shipping.returnsBody: AMAMBRA should support the statutory EU withdrawal period and a clear return portal before launch. Items must be unworn, unwashed, and returned with original tags.
shipping.standardDescription: Germany 2-4 business days, EU 4-7 business days

sizeGuide.headline: Size guide
sizeGuide.body: AMAMBRA pieces are designed with relaxed premium streetwear proportions. Choose your normal size for intended volume or size down for a closer fit.
